title: stipa lagascae subsp. normalis
intro: Stipa lagascae subsp. normalis, also known as the Lagasce's fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The Lagasce's fescue is said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and infusions-based tinctures to harness its health benefits.
